summary: Client Profile View Enhancement Testing - All 16 features tested and PASSED. Session Notes display with View/Edit dialogs, Start Session Note workflow with validation, Book Appointment dialog, and assistant access restrictions all working correctly.

accessibility_warnings.issue: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Client Profile View enhancements working correctly. Session Notes, Book Appointment, and assistant access restrictions all verified.

sessions_tab_shows_session_notes.notes: Sessions tab displays Session Notes list with date, SOAP/DAP badge, and assessment preview

view_edit_buttons_on_notes.notes: Each session note has View (eye) and Edit (pencil) buttons with data-testid attributes

view_session_note_dialog.notes: View dialog opens showing SOAP/DAP sections with color-coded backgrounds, created date, and linked appointment info

edit_session_note_dialog.notes: Edit dialog opens with pre-filled data, Note Type selector, and Save Changes/Cancel buttons

session_notes_hidden_from_assistants.notes: Assistants see 0 Session Notes, no Session Notes section in Sessions tab, no Start Session Note buttons

start_session_note_button_header.notes: Start Session Note button visible in header for therapists, hidden for assistants

start_session_note_button_sessions_tab.notes: Start Session Note button visible in Sessions tab for therapists, hidden for assistants

start_session_note_validates_case_histor.notes: Code validates case history is complete before allowing note creation (handleStartNewNote function)

start_session_note_validates_consent.notes: Code validates consent is signed before allowing note creation (handleStartNewNote function)

create_session_note_dialog.notes: Dialog shows SOAP/DAP type selector, appointment link dropdown with recent appointments, and required fields

create_session_note_api_call.notes: Form submits to POST /api/session-notes with client_id, template_type, appointment_id, and note fields

book_appointment_button_header.notes: Book Appointment button visible in header with data-testid='book-appointment-btn'

book_appointment_button_sessions_tab.notes: Book Appointment button visible in Sessions tab with data-testid='sessions-book-appointment-btn'

book_appointment_dialog.notes: Dialog shows date picker, available time slots section, notes field, and Book Appointment/Cancel buttons

available_slots_api_call.notes: Fetches slots from GET /api/available-slots/{therapist_id}?date= when date is selected

read_only_mode_disables_buttons.notes: Book Appointment and Start Session Note buttons have disabled={isReadOnly} prop

elements: Session Notes list with View/Edit buttons (therapist only)
All Appointments list with status badges
Create Session Note and Cancel buttons
